message:
test(errors): update remaining assertions to kebab-case err.kind values

Follow-up to f52aec01 "fix(errors): normalize all err.kind values to
kebab-case": a batch of test assertions in src/lib.rs still compared
err.kind against the old snake_case spellings (`index_busy`,
`session_id_not_found`, `invalid_agent`, `unknown_agent`, `file_read`,
`opencode_sqlite_parse`) and so failed once the producer side had
been flipped to kebab-case.

Re-aligns those assertions with the now-canonical wire format
(`index-busy`, `session-id-not-found`, `invalid-agent`,
`unknown-agent`, `file-read`, `opencode-sqlite-parse`). Pure test
fixup — no behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
